2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 8 (Quality Assurance Plan) 8 - 125 • Acid resistance test • Hydraulic thrust endurance test. b) Cells and batteries • Tests for capacities for 10 hr and 30 minutes discharge rates and test for voltage during discharge. • Ampere hours and watt-hour efficiency test. • Tests for retention of charge. • Endurance tests. ii) Acceptance Tests -
